name: sentinel-coder
description: Sentinel Coder One Studio - autonomous AI coding with single-model full-capability mode, opt-in Agentic Profiles, live provider model/context discovery, operation-aware native tool routing, VS Code Web remote-tool bridge support, media/document Studio, safer tools, dynamic context, and multi-provider orchestration.

languageModelChatProviders.displayName: Sentinel Coder One Studio (Agentic Profiles, live model context windows, Azure GPT-5.5 1M, Grok, OpenRouter, Groq + media studio)

chatParticipants.name: sentinel
chatParticipants.description: Multi-provider AI coding, media and document studio by QubitPage Research. Uses Agentic Profiles, live provider model metadata/context windows, Azure GPT-5.5/GPT-5.4/GPT-4.1/Grok deployments, OpenRouter/free, Groq, Azure Sora 2, image/audio tools, Studio viewer, checkpoints and optional firewall scans.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new file with generated code

commands.title: Sentinel Coder: Refresh Media & Document Studio
Sentinel Coder: Open Media & Document Studio
Sentinel Coder: Atlas Voice Bridge Status
Sentinel Coder: Send Last Atlas Voice Command to Copilot
Sentinel Coder: Configure Web Remote Tool Bridge
Sentinel Coder: Test Web Remote Tool Bridge

sentinelCoder.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens to generate per response. 0 = Auto: use the selected model's full output limit so long answers are never truncated mid-response. A non-zero value caps output but is never allowed to exceed the model's real limit.

sentinelCoder.contextBudgetTokens.description: Approximate input-context token budget ceiling for long agent sessions. Sentinel detects the selected model window, but will not automatically fill 1M-token contexts unless you explicitly raise this budget; older turns are summarized to prevent runaway cost.

sentinelCoder.terminalMaxSessions.description: Maximum number of named persistent terminal sessions Sentinel may keep alive at once. Increase carefully on high-memory workstations or remote servers.

sentinelCoder.terminalMinFreeMemoryMb.description: Minimum free system memory required before Sentinel starts a new terminal session. Set 0 to disable the guard. Existing sessions can still be reused.

sentinelCoder.terminalIdleCleanupSeconds.description: Seconds before idle non-default terminal sessions are disposed to reduce memory/process pressure.

sentinelCoder.approvalMode.description: Tool approval mode: default (ask each tool and manual Continue), bypass (auto-approve safe/moderate tools, ask dangerous, manual Continue), autopilot (auto-approve all tools and auto-continue)

sentinelCoder.providers.description: Configured API providers (auto-managed by the extension)

sentinelCoder.apiKeysFile.description: (Optional) Path to a text file for bulk-importing API keys. Leave empty to use the Settings > Providers panel instead.

sentinelCoder.azureOpenAIResourceGroup.description: Optional Azure OpenAI / Azure AI Foundry resource group used by Azure CLI-backed discovery/media tools. You can also set AZURE_OPENAI_RESOURCE_GROUP.

sentinelCoder.azureOpenAIAccount.description: Optional Azure OpenAI / Azure AI Foundry account/resource name used by Azure CLI-backed discovery/media tools. You can also set AZURE_OPENAI_ACCOUNT.

sentinelCoder.mcpServers.markdownDescription: MCP server configurations. Each entry needs `name`, `command`, `args[]`, and optionally `env{}` and `enabled`. Example: `{"name": "filesystem", "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem", "."], "enabled": true}`

sentinelCoder.atlasVoiceBridgePort.description: Localhost HTTP port used by Vultr Atlas to hand off voice commands into VS Code/Copilot Chat.

sentinelCoder.atlasVoiceAutoOpenChat.description: Open GitHub Copilot Chat with the Atlas voice prompt when a command arrives.

sentinelCoder.atlasVoiceAutoRunCopilotMo.description: Also send Atlas voice prompts to the VS Code Language Model API using a Copilot model when user consent is available.

sentinelCoder.atlasVoiceAllowedOrigins.description: Origins allowed to call the local Atlas Voice Bridge.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContextEnabled.description: Enable automatic dynamic context injection (active file, tabs, diagnostics, git, provider metadata) into agent turns.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContextMaxChars.description: Maximum characters of auto-refreshed dynamic context included per turn to control token/cost usage.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContext.enabled.description: Enable automatic dynamic context injection (active file, tabs, diagnostics, git, provider metadata) into agent turns.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContext.maxChars.description: Maximum characters of auto-refreshed dynamic context included per turn to control token/cost usage.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContext.includeActi.description: Include active editor/selection preview in automatic dynamic context.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContext.includeOpen.description: Include open tab names in automatic dynamic context.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContext.includeDiag.description: Include current VS Code diagnostics summary in automatic dynamic context.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContext.includeGitS.description: Include git status/recent change summary in automatic dynamic context when available.

sentinelCoder.dynamicContext.includeProv.description: Include selected model/provider and Agentic Profile metadata in automatic dynamic context.

sentinelCoder.webRemoteBridgeEnabled.markdownDescription: Enable VS Code Web remote tool routing through a trusted Sentinel Remote Tool Bridge. The browser cannot run local terminal/SSH/Docker/MCP directly; the bridge performs approved operations on a machine you control.

sentinelCoder.webRemoteBridgeUrl.markdownDescription: HTTPS base URL for the Sentinel Remote Tool Bridge used by vscode.dev/github.dev, e.g. `https://agent.example.com`. Store the bearer token with `Sentinel Coder: Configure Web Remote Tool Bridge`, not in settings.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Sentinel Coder can activate in VS Code for the Web and virtual/remote workspaces. Full filesystem, terminal, SSH, Docker, MCP, and local-model tools run when VS Code provides a trusted desktop or remote workspace extension host; pure browser-only workspaces use the web-safe status/chat guidance layer.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: Sentinel Coder can activate in Restricted Mode with safe status/settings guidance. File edits, terminals, SSH, Docker, MCP, and other autonomous tools require a trusted workspace or trusted remote execution host.

scripts.test: npm run compile && npm run test:provider-capabilities && npm run test:web-bridge && npm run test:model-selector && npm run test:agentic-profiles
